name: SmileSIM
description: Cloud-based dental practice management platform with scheduling, patient records, treatment planning, and financial analytics.
longDescription: SmileSIM is a comprehensive cloud-based dental practice management platform designed to streamline operations for dental clinics and multi-location practices. Based in Romania, it offers an intelligent drag-and-drop calendar, automated SMS and email reminders, and a dedicated patient mobile app to enhance scheduling and reduce no-shows by up to 40%. The SmileSIM Cloud securely stores dental records, including X-rays, CBCT scans, and clinical photos, accessible from any device, with end-to-end encryption and compliance with GDPR and ISO/IEC 27018. Clinical tools include an interactive odontogram and visual treatment-plan builder to improve patient understanding and case acceptance. The Studio module enables photo annotation and real-time collaboration, ideal for interdisciplinary workflows. For practice managers, SmileSIM provides real-time financial dashboards, performance analytics, payment management with instalment plans, and staff scheduling, all within a bilingual (English/Romanian) interface that is intuitive and cloud-deployed for seamless updates. Suitable for single-chair surgeries and growing practices, SmileSIM enhances efficiency, patient satisfaction, and profitability.
features: Studio module for photo annotation and collaboration
Staff scheduler with vacation and time-off management
